label: 203_virus_outlook monetary_reopening_richard clarida
label_human: Federal Reserve outlook on economy reopening
description: The Federal Reserve discussed the economic recovery's progress through webcasts, emphasizing strong consumer demand and expanding vaccine coverage. Governors highlighted patience in monetary policy as sectors reopened, balancing fiscal support with inflation concerns.

earliest_articles.title: Covid-19 and the Future of the U.S. Economy
earliest_articles.excerpt: a 21 percent annual rate. On its own, a number that large would be remarkable and cause for celebration. However, even with this anticipated eye-catching rebound, the level of GDP would still be about 5 percent below its pre-pandemic level.
